questions.q: A student got 80, 75, 90, and 85 in four tests. To average 85, what must he score on the 5th test?
Average age of 4 people is 30. A person of age 20 joins. New average is:
questions.explanation: Total age before = 120. New total = 120 + 20 = 140. New average = 140/5 = 28
